emails.subject: Re: 531325
emails.body: Re: 531325 You're right thanks for checking up on us. This deal was actually done this morning before Credit came out with the updated watchlist. He checked with Tracy Ngo, our credit person, on the deal and she's aware of and okay with it. I guess Bob snuck one in there! Thanks, kate From: Sharen Cason 02/26/2001 02:27 PM
